		  ( TEST.TEST_NUMBER = BATCH_ENTRY.TEST ) AND
		  ( SAMPLE.ID_NUMERIC = TEST.SAMPLE ) AND
		  ( MLP_HEADER.IDENTITY = SAMPLE.PRODUCT ) and
		  ( MLP_COMPONENTS.ENTRY_CODE = MLP_VALUES.ENTRY_CODE ) and
		  ( MLP_LEVEL.LEVEL_ID = MLP_VALUES.LEVEL_ID ) and
		  ( MLP_COMPONENTS.ANALYSIS_ID = BATCH_HEADER.ANALYSIS ) AND
	     ( COMPONENT_VIEW.ANALYSIS = TEST.ANALYSIS ) AND
	     ( COMPONENT_VIEW.NAME = MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_NAME )
	UNION
	   SELECT BATCH_HEADER.IDENTITY,
			  BATCH_ENTRY.TEST,
		  BATCH_ENTRY.ORDER_NUMBER,
		  BATCH_ENTRY.TYPE,
		  MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_NAME,
		  MLP_COMPONENTS.UNITS,
		  MLP_LEVEL.LEVEL_ID,
		  MLP_VALUES.MIN_LIMIT,
		  MLP_VALUES.MAX_LIMIT,
		  RESULT.TEXT,
		  MLP_VALUES.BOOLEAN_PASS,
		  RESULT.RESULT_TYPE,
		  RESULT.TRUE_WORD,
		  SAMPLE.ID_TEXT,
		  RESULT.STATUS,
		  COMPONENT_VIEW.ORDER_NUMBER
	     FROM BATCH_ENTRY,
		  BATCH_HEADER,
		  MLP_COMPONENTS,
		  MLP_HEADER,
		  MLP_LEVEL,
		  MLP_VALUES,
		  TEST,
		  SAMPLE,
		  RESULT,
		  COMPONENT_VIEW
	    WHERE ( BATCH_ENTRY.IDENTITY = BATCH_HEADER.IDENTITY ) and
		  ( TEST.TEST_NUMBER = BATCH_ENTRY.TEST ) AND
		  ( SAMPLE.ID_NUMERIC = TEST.SAMPLE ) AND
		  ( MLP_HEADER.IDENTITY = SAMPLE.PRODUCT ) and
		  ( MLP_COMPONENTS.ENTRY_CODE = MLP_VALUES.ENTRY_CODE ) and
		  ( MLP_LEVEL.LEVEL_ID = MLP_VALUES.LEVEL_ID ) and
		  ( MLP_COMPONENTS.ANALYSIS_ID = BATCH_HEADER.ANALYSIS ) AND
		  ( RESULT.TEST_NUMBER = BATCH_ENTRY.TEST ) AND
		  ( RESULT.NAME = MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_NAME ) AND
	     ( COMPONENT_VIEW.ANALYSIS = TEST.ANALYSIS ) AND
	     ( COMPONENT_VIEW.NAME = MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_NAME )
	EXCEPT
	   SELECT BATCH_HEADER.IDENTITY,
			  BATCH_ENTRY.TEST,
		  BATCH_ENTRY.ORDER_NUMBER,
		  BATCH_ENTRY.TYPE,
		  COMPONENT_VIEW.NAME,
		  COMPONENT_VIEW.UNITS,
		  'XXXXXXXXXX',
		  'XXXXXXXXXX',
		  'XXXXXXXXXX',
		  'XXXXXXXXXX',
		  'X',
		  'X',
		  'XXXXXXXXXX',
		  SAMPLE.ID_TEXT,
		  'X',
		  COMPONENT_VIEW.ORDER_NUMBER
	     FROM BATCH_ENTRY,
		  BATCH_HEADER,
		    COMPONENT_VIEW,
		  TEST,
		  SAMPLE,
		  RESULT
	    WHERE ( COMPONENT_VIEW.ANALYSIS = TEST.ANALYSIS ) and
		  ( BATCH_ENTRY.IDENTITY = BATCH_HEADER.IDENTITY ) and
		  ( BATCH_ENTRY.TEST = TEST.TEST_NUMBER ) and
		  ( SAMPLE.ID_NUMERIC = TEST.SAMPLE ) AND
	     ( RESULT.TEST_NUMBER = TEST.TEST_NUMBER ) AND
	     ( RESULT.NAME = COMPONENT_VIEW.NAME )

	EXCEPT

	   SELECT BATCH_HEADER.IDENTITY,
			  BATCH_ENTRY.TEST,
		  BATCH_ENTRY.ORDER_NUMBER,
		  BATCH_ENTRY.TYPE,
		  MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_NAME,
		  MLP_COMPONENTS.UNITS,
		  'XXXXXXXXXX',
		  'XXXXXXXXXX',
		  'XXXXXXXXXX',
		  'XXXXXXXXXX',
		  'X',
		  'X',
		  'XXXXXXXXXX',
		  SAMPLE.ID_TEXT,
		  'X',
	     COMPONENT_VIEW.ORDER_NUMBER
	     FROM BATCH_ENTRY,
		  BATCH_HEADER,
		  MLP_COMPONENTS,
		  MLP_HEADER,
		  MLP_LEVEL,
		  MLP_VALUES,
		  TEST,
		  SAMPLE,
		  COMPONENT_VIEW
	    WHERE ( BATCH_ENTRY.IDENTITY = BATCH_HEADER.IDENTITY ) and
		  ( TEST.TEST_NUMBER = BATCH_ENTRY.TEST ) AND
		  ( SAMPLE.ID_NUMERIC = TEST.SAMPLE ) AND
		  ( MLP_HEADER.IDENTITY = SAMPLE.PRODUCT ) and
		  ( MLP_COMPONENTS.ENTRY_CODE = MLP_VALUES.ENTRY_CODE ) and
		  ( MLP_LEVEL.LEVEL_ID = MLP_VALUES.LEVEL_ID ) and
		  ( MLP_COMPONENTS.ANALYSIS_ID = BATCH_HEADER.ANALYSIS ) AND
	     ( COMPONENT_VIEW.ANALYSIS = TEST.ANALYSIS ) AND
	     ( COMPONENT_VIEW.NAME = MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_NAME )

	EXCEPT
	   SELECT BATCH_HEADER.IDENTITY,
			  BATCH_ENTRY.TEST,
		  BATCH_ENTRY.ORDER_NUMBER,
		  BATCH_ENTRY.TYPE,
		  MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_NAME,
		  MLP_COMPONENTS.UNITS,
		  'XXXXXXXXXX',
		  'XXXXXXXXXX',
		  'XXXXXXXXXX',
		  RESULT.TEXT,
		  'X',
		  RESULT.RESULT_TYPE,
		  RESULT.TRUE_WORD,
		  SAMPLE.ID_TEXT,
		  RESULT.STATUS,
		  COMPONENT_VIEW.ORDER_NUMBER
	     FROM BATCH_ENTRY,
		  BATCH_HEADER,
		  MLP_COMPONENTS,
		  MLP_HEADER,
		  MLP_LEVEL,
		  MLP_VALUES,
		  TEST,
		  SAMPLE,
		  RESULT,
		  COMPONENT_VIEW
	    WHERE ( BATCH_ENTRY.IDENTITY = BATCH_HEADER.IDENTITY ) and
		  ( TEST.TEST_NUMBER = BATCH_ENTRY.TEST ) AND
		  ( SAMPLE.ID_NUMERIC = TEST.SAMPLE ) AND
		  ( MLP_HEADER.IDENTITY = SAMPLE.PRODUCT ) and
		  ( MLP_COMPONENTS.ENTRY_CODE = MLP_VALUES.ENTRY_CODE ) and
		  ( MLP_LEVEL.LEVEL_ID = MLP_VALUES.LEVEL_ID ) and
		  ( MLP_COMPONENTS.ANALYSIS_ID = BATCH_HEADER.ANALYSIS ) AND
	     ( RESULT.TEST_NUMBER = BATCH_ENTRY.TEST ) AND
	     ( RESULT.NAME = MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_NAME ) AND
	     ( COMPONENT_VIEW.ANALYSIS = TEST.ANALYSIS ) AND
	     ( COMPONENT_VIEW.NAME = MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_NAME )

	EXCEPT
	   SELECT BATCH_HEADER.IDENTITY,
			  BATCH_ENTRY.TEST,
		  BATCH_ENTRY.ORDER_NUMBER,
		  BATCH_ENTRY.TYPE,
		  MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_NAME,
		  MLP_COMPONENTS.UNITS,
		  MLP_LEVEL.LEVEL_ID,
		  MLP_VALUES.MIN_LIMIT,
		  MLP_VALUES.MAX_LIMIT,
		  'XXXXXXXXXX',
		  MLP_VALUES.BOOLEAN_PASS,
		  'X',
		  'XXXXXXXXXX',
		  SAMPLE.ID_TEXT,
		  'X',
		  COMPONENT_VIEW.ORDER_NUMBER
	     FROM BATCH_ENTRY,
		  BATCH_HEADER,
		  MLP_COMPONENTS,
		  MLP_HEADER,
		  MLP_LEVEL,
		  MLP_VALUES,
		  TEST,
		  SAMPLE,
		  RESULT,
		  COMPONENT_VIEW
	    WHERE ( BATCH_ENTRY.IDENTITY = BATCH_HEADER.IDENTITY ) and
		  ( TEST.TEST_NUMBER = BATCH_ENTRY.TEST ) AND
		  ( SAMPLE.ID_NUMERIC = TEST.SAMPLE ) AND
		  ( MLP_HEADER.IDENTITY = SAMPLE.PRODUCT ) and
		  ( MLP_COMPONENTS.ENTRY_CODE = MLP_VALUES.ENTRY_CODE ) and
		  ( MLP_LEVEL.LEVEL_ID = MLP_VALUES.LEVEL_ID ) and
		  ( MLP_COMPONENTS.ANALYSIS_ID = BATCH_HEADER.ANALYSIS ) AND
		  ( RESULT.TEST_NUMBER = BATCH_ENTRY.TEST ) AND
	     ( RESULT.NAME = MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_NAME ) AND
	     ( COMPONENT_VIEW.ANALYSIS = TEST.ANALYSIS ) AND
	     ( COMPONENT_VIEW.NAME = MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_NAME ) ;

{*******************************************************************************
* Report View r_batch_tmpl_components_list
*******************************************************************************}

view r_batch_tmpl_components_list on_table component_view ;

	field identity
		links_to mlp_header . identity;
	field level_id
		links_to mlp_values . level_id;
	field min_limit
		links_to mlp_values . min_limit;
	field max_limit
		links_to mlp_values . max_limit;
	field boolean_pass
		links_to mlp_values . boolean_pass ;
	field component_name
		links_to mlp_components . component_name ;
	field component_type 
		links_to mlp_components . component_type ;
	field places
		links_to mlp_components . places ;
	field units
		links_to mlp_components . units ;
	field order_number
		links_to versioned_c_l_entry . order_number ;
	field replicate_count
		links_to versioned_c_l_entry . replicate_count ;
	field result_entry
		links_to versioned_c_l_entry . result_entry ;
	field create_always 
		links_to versioned_c_l_entry . create_always ;
	field analysis_version
		links_to versioned_c_l_entry . analysis_version ;
	field spike_value
		links_to versioned_c_l_entry . spike_value ;
	field analysis
		links_to BATCH_TMPL_HEADER.ANALYSIS ;

oracle_specific_select

	SELECT 		MLP_HEADER.IDENTITY,
		MLP_VALUES.LEVEL_ID ,
		'XXXXX',
		'XXXXX',
		'X',
		COMPONENT_VIEW.NAME,
		COMPONENT_VIEW.RESULT_TYPE,
		COMPONENT_VIEW.PLACES,
		COMPONENT_VIEW.UNITS,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.order_number ,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.replicate_count ,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.result_entry ,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.create_always ,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.analysis_version,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.spike_value,
		BATCH_TMPL_HEADER.ANALYSIS 
	FROM 		COMPONENT_VIEW , 
		MLP_VALUES , 
		MLP_HEADER,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY,
		BATCH_TMPL_HEADER
	WHERE 	COMPONENT_VIEW.ANALYSIS = BATCH_TMPL_HEADER.ANALYSIS AND
	      	MLP_VALUES.ENTRY_CODE = MLP_HEADER.ENTRY_CODE AND
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.ANALYSIS = COMPONENT_VIEW.ANALYSIS and
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.NAME = COMPONENT_VIEW.NAME AND
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.COMP_LIST = MLP_HEADER.IDENTITY AND
		BATCH_TMPL_HEADER.IDENTITY = MLP_HEADER.IDENTITY
	UNION
	SELECT		MLP_COMPONENTS.PRODUCT_ID,
		MLP_VALUES.LEVEL_ID ,
		MLP_VALUES.MIN_LIMIT ,
		MLP_VALUES.MAX_LIMIT ,
		MLP_VALUES.BOOLEAN_PASS ,
		MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_NAME,
		MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_TYPE,
		MLP_COMPONENTS.PLACES,
		MLP_COMPONENTS.UNITS,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.order_number ,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.replicate_count ,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.result_entry ,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.create_always ,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.analysis_version,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.spike_value,
		BATCH_TMPL_HEADER.ANALYSIS 
	FROM 		MLP_COMPONENTS , 
		MLP_VALUES,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY,
		BATCH_TMPL_HEADER
	WHERE 	MLP_COMPONENTS.ANALYSIS_ID = BATCH_TMPL_HEADER.ANALYSIS  AND
		MLP_COMPONENTS.PRODUCT_VERSION = ( SELECT MAX ( PRODUCT_VERSION )
		                                     FROM MLP_COMPONENTS
		                                    WHERE ANALYSIS_ID = BATCH_TMPL_HEADER.ANALYSIS  ) AND
      	MLP_VALUES.ENTRY_CODE = MLP_COMPONENTS.ENTRY_CODE AND
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.ANALYSIS = MLP_COMPONENTS.ANALYSIS_ID and
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.NAME = MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_NAME AND
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.COMP_LIST = MLP_COMPONENTS.PRODUCT_ID AND
		BATCH_TMPL_HEADER.IDENTITY = MLP_COMPONENTS.PRODUCT_ID
	MINUS
	SELECT		MLP_COMPONENTS.PRODUCT_ID,
		MLP_VALUES.LEVEL_ID ,
		'XXXXX',
		'XXXXX',
		'X',
		MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_NAME,
		MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_TYPE,
		MLP_COMPONENTS.PLACES,
		MLP_COMPONENTS.UNITS,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.order_number ,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.replicate_count ,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.result_entry ,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.create_always ,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.analysis_version,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.spike_value,
		BATCH_TMPL_HEADER.ANALYSIS 
	FROM 		MLP_COMPONENTS , 
		MLP_VALUES,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY,
		BATCH_TMPL_HEADER
	WHERE 	MLP_COMPONENTS.ANALYSIS_ID = BATCH_TMPL_HEADER.ANALYSIS AND
		MLP_COMPONENTS.PRODUCT_VERSION = ( SELECT MAX ( PRODUCT_VERSION )
		                                     FROM MLP_COMPONENTS
		                                    WHERE ANALYSIS_ID = BATCH_TMPL_HEADER.ANALYSIS  ) AND
	      	MLP_VALUES.ENTRY_CODE = MLP_COMPONENTS.ENTRY_CODE AND
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.ANALYSIS = MLP_COMPONENTS.ANALYSIS_ID and
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.NAME = MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_NAME AND
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.COMP_LIST = MLP_COMPONENTS.PRODUCT_ID AND
		BATCH_TMPL_HEADER.IDENTITY = MLP_COMPONENTS.PRODUCT_ID ;

	SELECT 		MLP_HEADER.[IDENTITY],
		MLP_VALUES.LEVEL_ID ,
		'XXXXX',
		'XXXXX',
		'X',
		COMPONENT_VIEW.NAME,
		COMPONENT_VIEW.RESULT_TYPE,
		COMPONENT_VIEW.PLACES,
		COMPONENT_VIEW.UNITS,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.order_number ,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.replicate_count ,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.result_entry ,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.create_always ,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.analysis_version,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.spike_value,
		BATCH_TMPL_HEADER.ANALYSIS 
	FROM 		COMPONENT_VIEW , 
		MLP_VALUES , 
		MLP_HEADER,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY,
		BATCH_TMPL_HEADER
	WHERE 	COMPONENT_VIEW.ANALYSIS = BATCH_TMPL_HEADER.ANALYSIS AND
	      	MLP_VALUES.ENTRY_CODE = MLP_HEADER.ENTRY_CODE AND
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.ANALYSIS = COMPONENT_VIEW.ANALYSIS and
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.NAME = COMPONENT_VIEW.NAME AND
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.COMP_LIST = MLP_HEADER.[IDENTITY] AND
		BATCH_TMPL_HEADER.[IDENTITY] = MLP_HEADER.[IDENTITY]
	UNION
	SELECT		MLP_COMPONENTS.PRODUCT_ID,
		MLP_VALUES.LEVEL_ID ,
		MLP_VALUES.MIN_LIMIT ,
		MLP_VALUES.MAX_LIMIT ,
		MLP_VALUES.BOOLEAN_PASS ,
		MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_NAME,
		MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_TYPE,
		MLP_COMPONENTS.PLACES,
		MLP_COMPONENTS.UNITS,

		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.replicate_count ,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.result_entry ,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.create_always ,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.analysis_version,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.spike_value,

	FROM 		MLP_COMPONENTS , 
		MLP_VALUES,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY,
		BATCH_TMPL_HEADER
	WHERE 	MLP_COMPONENTS.ANALYSIS_ID = BATCH_TMPL_HEADER.ANALYSIS  AND
		MLP_COMPONENTS.PRODUCT_VERSION = ( SELECT MAX ( PRODUCT_VERSION )
		                                     FROM MLP_COMPONENTS
		                                    WHERE ANALYSIS_ID = BATCH_TMPL_HEADER.ANALYSIS  ) AND
      	MLP_VALUES.ENTRY_CODE = MLP_COMPONENTS.ENTRY_CODE AND
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.ANALYSIS = MLP_COMPONENTS.ANALYSIS_ID and
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.NAME = MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_NAME AND
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.COMP_LIST = MLP_COMPONENTS.PRODUCT_ID AND
		BATCH_TMPL_HEADER.[IDENTITY] = MLP_COMPONENTS.PRODUCT_ID
	EXCEPT
	SELECT		MLP_COMPONENTS.PRODUCT_ID,
		MLP_VALUES.LEVEL_ID ,
		'XXXXX',
		'XXXXX',
		'X',
		MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_NAME,
		MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_TYPE,
		MLP_COMPONENTS.PLACES,
		MLP_COMPONENTS.UNITS,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.order_number ,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.replicate_count ,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.result_entry ,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.create_always ,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.analysis_version,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.spike_value,
		BATCH_TMPL_HEADER.ANALYSIS 
	FROM 		MLP_COMPONENTS , 
		MLP_VALUES,
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY,
		BATCH_TMPL_HEADER
	WHERE 	MLP_COMPONENTS.ANALYSIS_ID = BATCH_TMPL_HEADER.ANALYSIS AND
		MLP_COMPONENTS.PRODUCT_VERSION = ( SELECT MAX ( PRODUCT_VERSION )
		                                     FROM MLP_COMPONENTS
		                                    WHERE ANALYSIS_ID = BATCH_TMPL_HEADER.ANALYSIS  ) AND
	      	MLP_VALUES.ENTRY_CODE = MLP_COMPONENTS.ENTRY_CODE AND
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.ANALYSIS = MLP_COMPONENTS.ANALYSIS_ID and
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.NAME = MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_NAME AND
		VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.COMP_LIST = MLP_COMPONENTS.PRODUCT_ID AND
		BATCH_TMPL_HEADER.[IDENTITY] = MLP_COMPONENTS.PRODUCT_ID ;

{*******************************************************************************
* Report View r_sample_worksheet
*******************************************************************************}

view r_sample_worksheet ;

	field worksheet
		links_to worksheet . identity;
	field sample
		links_to test . sample ;
	field test_number
		links_to test . test_number ;
	field analysis
		links_to test . analysis ;
	field test_count
		links_to test . test_count ;
	field name
		links_to result . name ;
	field units
		links_to result . units ;
	field result_type
		links_to result . result_type ;
	field true_word
		links_to result . true_word ;
	field false_word
		links_to result . false_word ;
	field order_number
		links_to result . order_number ;
	field id_text 
		links_to sample . id_text ;
	field date_generated
		links_to worksheet . date_generated ;
	field assigned_operator
		links_to worksheet . assigned_operator ;
	field text
		links_to result . text ;
		
select_clause

	SELECT 
		WORKSHEET.[IDENTITY],
		TEST.SAMPLE,
		TEST.TEST_NUMBER,
		TEST.ANALYSIS,
		TEST.TEST_COUNT,
		RESULT.NAME,
		RESULT.UNITS,
		RESULT.RESULT_TYPE,
		RESULT.TRUE_WORD,
		RESULT.FALSE_WORD,
		RESULT.ORDER_NUMBER,
		SAMPLE.ID_TEXT,
		WORKSHEET.DATE_GENERATED,
		WORKSHEET.ASSIGNED_OPERATOR,
		RESULT.TEXT
	FROM WORKSHEET , TEST, SAMPLE, RESULT
	WHERE 	TEST.WORKSHEET = WORKSHEET.LINK_NUMBER AND
		TEST.SAMPLE = SAMPLE.ID_NUMERIC AND
		TEST.TEST_NUMBER = RESULT.TEST_NUMBER 

UNION

	SELECT DISTINCT
		W2.[IDENTITY],
		T2.SAMPLE,
		T2.TEST_NUMBER,
		T2.ANALYSIS,
		T2.TEST_COUNT,
		VC2.NAME,
		VC2.UNITS,
		VC2.RESULT_TYPE,
		VC2.TRUE_WORD,
		VC2.FALSE_WORD,
		VC2.ORDER_NUMBER,
		S2.ID_TEXT,
		W2.DATE_GENERATED,
		W2.ASSIGNED_OPERATOR,
		' '
	FROM WORKSHEET W2
	JOIN TEST T2 ON T2.WORKSHEET = W2.LINK_NUMBER
	JOIN SAMPLE S2 ON T2.SAMPLE = S2.ID_NUMERIC 
	JOIN VERSIONED_COMPONENT VC2 ON VC2.ANALYSIS = T2.ANALYSIS AND
				     VC2.ANALYSIS_VERSION = T2.ANALYSIS_VERSION
  	 WHERE 	VC2.NAME NOT IN ( SELECT NAME FROM RESULT R2 WHERE R2.TEST_NUMBER = T2.TEST_NUMBER ) AND
		T2.HAS_RESULT_LIST = 'F' ;


{*******************************************************************************
* Report View r_work_profile_components_list
*******************************************************************************}
		
view r_work_profile_components_list ;

	field identity
		links_to test_sched_entry . identity;
		
	field analysis
		links_to versioned_c_l_header . analysis ;
		
	field analysis_version
		links_to versioned_c_l_header . analysis_version ;
		
	field component_name
		links_to versioned_c_l_entry . name ;
		
	field order_number
		links_to versioned_c_l_entry . order_number ;
		
	field units
		links_to versioned_component . units ;
		
	field places
		links_to versioned_component . places ;
		
	field result_type
		links_to versioned_component . result_type ;
		
	field level_id
		links_to mlp_values . level_id ;
		
	field min_limit
		links_to mlp_values . min_limit ;
		
	field max_limit
		links_to mlp_values . max_limit ;
		
	field boolean_pass
		links_to mlp_values . boolean_pass ;
		
	field instrument
		links_to test_sched_entry . instrument_id ;

oracle_specific_select

	SELECT TEST_SCHED_ENTRY.IDENTITY,
	       VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS,
	       VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS_VERSION,
	       'XXXXX',
	       'XXXXX',
	       'XXXXX',
	       999,
	       'X',
	       'XXXXX',
	       'XXXXX',
	       'XXXXX',
	       'X',
	       TEST_SCHED_ENTRY.INSTRUMENT_ID
	FROM  VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER , TEST_SCHED_ENTRY
	WHERE VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.COMP_LIST = TEST_SCHED_ENTRY.COMPONENT_LIST
	UNION
	SELECT TEST_SCHED_ENTRY.IDENTITY,
	       VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS,
	       VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS_VERSION,
	       VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.NAME,
	       VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.ORDER_NUMBER,
	       VERSIONED_COMPONENT.UNITS,
	       VERSIONED_COMPONENT.PLACES,
	       VERSIONED_COMPONENT.RESULT_TYPE,
	       'XXXXX',
	       'XXXXX',
	       'XXXXX',
	       'X',
	       TEST_SCHED_ENTRY.INSTRUMENT_ID
	FROM  VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY,VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER,VERSIONED_COMPONENT ,TEST_SCHED_ENTRY
	WHERE VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.ANALYSIS = VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS AND
	      VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.ANALYSIS_VERSION = VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS_VERSION AND
	      VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.COMP_LIST = TEST_SCHED_ENTRY.COMPONENT_LIST AND
	      VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.COMP_LIST = TEST_SCHED_ENTRY.COMPONENT_LIST AND
	      VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ANALYSIS = VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS AND
	      VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ANALYSIS_VERSION = VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS_VERSION AND
	      VERSIONED_COMPONENT.NAME = VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.NAME 
	UNION
	SELECT TEST_SCHED_ENTRY.IDENTITY,
	       VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS,
	       VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS_VERSION,
	       VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.NAME,
	       VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.ORDER_NUMBER,
	       VERSIONED_COMPONENT.UNITS,
	       VERSIONED_COMPONENT.PLACES,
	       VERSIONED_COMPONENT.RESULT_TYPE,
	       MLP_VALUES.LEVEL_ID ,
	       MLP_VALUES.MIN_LIMIT ,
	       MLP_VALUES.MAX_LIMIT,
	       MLP_VALUES.BOOLEAN_PASS,
	       TEST_SCHED_ENTRY.INSTRUMENT_ID
	FROM  VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY,VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER, MLP_COMPONENTS , MLP_VALUES ,VERSIONED_COMPONENT,
	      TEST_SCHED_ENTRY
	WHERE VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.ANALYSIS = VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS AND
	      VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.ANALYSIS_VERSION = VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS_VERSION AND
	      VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.COMP_LIST = TEST_SCHED_ENTRY.COMPONENT_LIST AND
	      VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.COMP_LIST = TEST_SCHED_ENTRY.COMPONENT_LIST AND
	      MLP_COMPONENTS.ANALYSIS_ID = VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS AND
	      MLP_COMPONENTS.PRODUCT_ID = TEST_SCHED_ENTRY.COMPONENT_LIST AND
	      MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_NAME = VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.NAME AND
	      MLP_VALUES.ENTRY_CODE = MLP_COMPONENTS.ENTRY_CODE AND
	      VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ANALYSIS = VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS AND
	      VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ANALYSIS_VERSION = VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS_VERSION AND
	      VERSIONED_COMPONENT.NAME = VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.NAME
	MINUS
	SELECT TEST_SCHED_ENTRY.IDENTITY,
	       VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS,
	       VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS_VERSION,
	       'XXXXX',
	       'XXXXX',
	       'XXXXX',
	       999,
	       'X',
	       'XXXXX',
	       'XXXXX',
	       'XXXXX',
	       'X',
	       TEST_SCHED_ENTRY.INSTRUMENT_ID
	FROM  VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY,VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER, MLP_COMPONENTS , MLP_VALUES,VERSIONED_COMPONENT,
	      TEST_SCHED_ENTRY
	WHERE VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.ANALYSIS = VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS AND
	      VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.ANALYSIS_VERSION = VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS_VERSION AND
	      VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.COMP_LIST = TEST_SCHED_ENTRY.COMPONENT_LIST AND
	      VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.COMP_LIST = TEST_SCHED_ENTRY.COMPONENT_LIST AND
	      MLP_COMPONENTS.ANALYSIS_ID = VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS AND
	      MLP_COMPONENTS.PRODUCT_ID = TEST_SCHED_ENTRY.COMPONENT_LIST AND
	      MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_NAME = VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.NAME AND
	      MLP_VALUES.ENTRY_CODE = MLP_COMPONENTS.ENTRY_CODE AND
	      VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ANALYSIS = VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS AND
	      VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ANALYSIS_VERSION = VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS_VERSION AND

	      VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.ANALYSIS_VERSION = VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS_VERSION AND
	      VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.COMP_LIST = TEST_SCHED_ENTRY.COMPONENT_LIST AND
	      VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.COMP_LIST = TEST_SCHED_ENTRY.COMPONENT_LIST
	EXCEPT
	SELECT TEST_SCHED_ENTRY.IDENTITY,
	       VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS,
	       VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS_VERSION,
	       VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.NAME,
	       VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.ORDER_NUMBER,
	       VERSIONED_COMPONENT.UNITS,
	       VERSIONED_COMPONENT.PLACES,
	       VERSIONED_COMPONENT.RESULT_TYPE,
	       'XXXXX',
	       'XXXXX',
	       'XXXXX',
	       'X',
	       TEST_SCHED_ENTRY.INSTRUMENT_ID
	FROM  VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY,VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER, MLP_COMPONENTS , MLP_VALUES,VERSIONED_COMPONENT,
	      TEST_SCHED_ENTRY
	WHERE VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.ANALYSIS = VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS AND
	      VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.ANALYSIS_VERSION = VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS_VERSION AND
	      VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.COMP_LIST = TEST_SCHED_ENTRY.COMPONENT_LIST AND
	      VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.COMP_LIST = TEST_SCHED_ENTRY.COMPONENT_LIST AND
	      MLP_COMPONENTS.ANALYSIS_ID = VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS AND
	      MLP_COMPONENTS.PRODUCT_ID = TEST_SCHED_ENTRY.COMPONENT_LIST AND
	      MLP_COMPONENTS.COMPONENT_NAME = VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.NAME AND
	      MLP_VALUES.ENTRY_CODE = MLP_COMPONENTS.ENTRY_CODE AND
	      MLP_VALUES.ENTRY_CODE = MLP_COMPONENTS.ENTRY_CODE AND
	      VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ANALYSIS = VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS AND
	      VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ANALYSIS_VERSION = VERSIONED_C_L_HEADER.ANALYSIS_VERSION AND
	      VERSIONED_COMPONENT.NAME = VERSIONED_C_L_ENTRY.NAME ;

{*******************************************************************************
* Report View r_worksheet
*******************************************************************************}

view r_worksheet ;

	field worksheet 
		links_to worksheet . identity ;
		
	field description
		links_to versioned_analysis . description ;
		
	field minimum
		links_to versioned_component . minimum ;
		
	field maximum
		links_to versioned_component . maximum ;

	field units
		links_to versioned_component . units ;
		
	field name
		links_to versioned_component . name ;

	field calculation
		links_to versioned_analysis . calculation ;

	field analysis
		links_to versioned_analysis . identity ;
	
	field result_type
		links_to versioned_component . result_type ;

	field true_word
		links_to versioned_component . true_word ;

	field false_word
		links_to versioned_component . false_word ;
		
	field operator
		links_to worksheet . assigned_operator ;

	field date_generated
		links_to worksheet . date_generated ;

	field personnel
		links_to personnel . description ;

	field order_number
		links_to versioned_component . order_number ;

oracle_specific_select

	 SELECT WORKSHEET.IDENTITY,
		VERSIONED_ANALYSIS.DESCRIPTION,
		99999999.9,
		99999999.9,
		'XXXXXXXXXX',
		'XXXXXXXXXX',
		VERSIONED_ANALYSIS.CALCULATION,
		VERSIONED_ANALYSIS.IDENTITY,
		'X',
		'XXXXXXXXXX',
		'XXXXXXXXXX',
		WORKSHEET.ASSIGNED_OPERATOR,
		WORKSHEET.DATE_GENERATED,
		PERSONNEL.DESCRIPTION,
		'XXXXXXXXXX'
	   FROM VERSIONED_ANALYSIS,
		WORKSHEET
	   LEFT OUTER JOIN PERSONNEL ON PERSONNEL.IDENTITY = WORKSHEET.ASSIGNED_OPERATOR 
	  WHERE ( VERSIONED_ANALYSIS.ANALYSIS_VERSION = '         1' ) 

	UNION

	 SELECT WORKSHEET.IDENTITY,
		VERSIONED_ANALYSIS.DESCRIPTION,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.MINIMUM,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.MAXIMUM,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.UNITS,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.NAME,
		VERSIONED_ANALYSIS.CALCULATION,
		VERSIONED_ANALYSIS.IDENTITY,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.RESULT_TYPE,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.TRUE_WORD,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.FALSE_WORD,
		WORKSHEET.ASSIGNED_OPERATOR,
		WORKSHEET.DATE_GENERATED,
		PERSONNEL.DESCRIPTION,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ORDER_NUMBER
	   FROM VERSIONED_ANALYSIS,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT,
		WORKSHEET
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN PERSONNEL ON PERSONNEL.IDENTITY = WORKSHEET.ASSIGNED_OPERATOR
	  WHERE ( VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ANALYSIS = VERSIONED_ANALYSIS.IDENTITY ) AND
		( VERSIONED_ANALYSIS.ANALYSIS_VERSION = '         1' ) AND
		( VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ANALYSIS_VERSION = '         1' )

	MINUS

	 SELECT WORKSHEET.IDENTITY,
		VERSIONED_ANALYSIS.DESCRIPTION,
		99999999.9,
		99999999.9,
		'XXXXXXXXXX',
		'XXXXXXXXXX',
		VERSIONED_ANALYSIS.CALCULATION,
		VERSIONED_ANALYSIS.IDENTITY,
		'X',
		'XXXXXXXXXX',
		'XXXXXXXXXX',
		WORKSHEET.ASSIGNED_OPERATOR,
		WORKSHEET.DATE_GENERATED,
		PERSONNEL.DESCRIPTION,
		'XXXXXXXXXX'
	   FROM VERSIONED_ANALYSIS,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT,
		WORKSHEET
	LEFT OUTER JOIN PERSONNEL ON PERSONNEL.IDENTITY = WORKSHEET.ASSIGNED_OPERATOR
	  WHERE ( VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ANALYSIS = VERSIONED_ANALYSIS.IDENTITY ) AND
		( VERSIONED_ANALYSIS.ANALYSIS_VERSION = '         1' ) AND
		( VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ANALYSIS_VERSION = '         1' ) ;

{*******************************************************************************
* Report View r_worksheet_body
*******************************************************************************}      

view r_worksheet_body ;

	field worksheet
		links_to worksheet . identity ;
		
	field id_numeric
		links_to test . sample ;
		
	field test_count
		links_to test . test_count ;
		
	field test_number
		links_to test . test_number ;
		
	field id_text
		links_to sample . id_text ;
		
	field name
		links_to versioned_component . name ;
	

	field order_number
		links_to versioned_component . order_number ;
		
	field result_type
		links_to versioned_component . result_type ;
		
	field true_word
		links_to versioned_component . true_word ;
		
	field false_word
		links_to versioned_component . false_word ;
		
	field units
		links_to versioned_component . units ;
		
	field result_text
		links_to result . text ;

oracle_specific_select

	 SELECT WORKSHEET.IDENTITY,
		TEST.SAMPLE,   
		TEST.TEST_COUNT,
		TEST.TEST_NUMBER,   
		SAMPLE.ID_TEXT,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.NAME,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ORDER_NUMBER,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.RESULT_TYPE,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.TRUE_WORD,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.FALSE_WORD,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.UNITS,
		'XXXXXXXXXX'
	    FROM WORKSHEET,
		 TEST, 
		 SAMPLE,   
		 VERSIONED_COMPONENT
	   WHERE ( TEST.WORKSHEET = WORKSHEET.LINK_NUMBER ) AND
		 ( SAMPLE.ID_NUMERIC = TEST.SAMPLE ) AND
		 ( VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ANALYSIS = TEST.ANALYSIS ) AND
		 ( VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ANALYSIS_VERSION = TEST.ANALYSIS_VERSION )

	UNION

	  SELECT WORKSHEET.IDENTITY,
		 TEST.SAMPLE,   
		 TEST.TEST_COUNT,
		TEST.TEST_NUMBER,   
		 SAMPLE.ID_TEXT,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.NAME,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ORDER_NUMBER,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.RESULT_TYPE,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.TRUE_WORD,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.FALSE_WORD,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.UNITS,
		RESULT.TEXT
	    FROM WORKSHEET,
		 TEST, 
		 SAMPLE,   
		 VERSIONED_COMPONENT,
		RESULT
	   WHERE ( TEST.WORKSHEET = WORKSHEET.LINK_NUMBER ) AND
		 ( SAMPLE.ID_NUMERIC = TEST.SAMPLE ) AND
		 ( VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ANALYSIS = TEST.ANALYSIS ) AND
		 ( VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ANALYSIS_VERSION = TEST.ANALYSIS_VERSION ) AND
		( RESULT.TEST_NUMBER = TEST.TEST_NUMBER ) AND
		( RESULT.NAME = VERSIONED_COMPONENT.NAME)

	MINUS

	  SELECT WORKSHEET.IDENTITY,
		 TEST.SAMPLE,   
		 TEST.TEST_COUNT,
		TEST.TEST_NUMBER,   
		 SAMPLE.ID_TEXT,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.NAME,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ORDER_NUMBER,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.RESULT_TYPE,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.TRUE_WORD,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.FALSE_WORD,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.UNITS,
		'XXXXXXXXXX'
	    FROM WORKSHEET,
		 TEST, 
		 SAMPLE,   
		 VERSIONED_COMPONENT,
		RESULT
	   WHERE ( TEST.WORKSHEET = WORKSHEET.LINK_NUMBER ) AND 
		 ( SAMPLE.ID_NUMERIC = TEST.SAMPLE ) AND
		 ( VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ANALYSIS = TEST.ANALYSIS ) AND
		 ( VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ANALYSIS_VERSION = TEST.ANALYSIS_VERSION ) AND
		( RESULT.TEST_NUMBER = TEST.TEST_NUMBER ) AND
		( RESULT.NAME = VERSIONED_COMPONENT.NAME) ;
	
sqlserver_specific_select

	 SELECT WORKSHEET.[IDENTITY],
		TEST.SAMPLE,   
		TEST.TEST_COUNT,
		TEST.TEST_NUMBER,   
		SAMPLE.ID_TEXT,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.NAME,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ORDER_NUMBER,
		VERSIONED_COMPONENT.RESULT_TYPE,

		 SAMPLE,   
		 VERSIONED_COMPONENT,
		RESULT
	   WHERE ( TEST.WORKSHEET = WORKSHEET.LINK_NUMBER ) AND 
		 ( SAMPLE.ID_NUMERIC = TEST.SAMPLE ) AND
		 ( VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ANALYSIS = TEST.ANALYSIS ) AND
		 ( VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ANALYSIS_VERSION = TEST.ANALYSIS_VERSION ) AND
		( RESULT.TEST_NUMBER = TEST.TEST_NUMBER ) AND
		( RESULT.NAME = VERSIONED_COMPONENT.NAME) ;

		RESULT
	   WHERE ( TEST.WORKSHEET = WORKSHEET.LINK_NUMBER ) AND 
		 ( SAMPLE.ID_NUMERIC = TEST.SAMPLE ) AND
		 ( VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ANALYSIS = TEST.ANALYSIS ) AND
		 ( VERSIONED_COMPONENT.ANALYSIS_VERSION = TEST.ANALYSIS_VERSION ) AND
		( RESULT.TEST_NUMBER = TEST.TEST_NUMBER ) AND
		( RESULT.NAME = VERSIONED_COMPONENT.NAME) ;
	
table instrument_template;

	field identity
		datatype identity
		used_for unique_key, display_browse ( 1 );

	field name
		datatype text ( 100 )
		used_for translation,primary_browse, name;

	field group_id alias group
		used_for security_id
		links_to group_header . identity;

	field description
		datatype text ( 255 )
		used_for translation,display_browse ( 2 );

	field modifiable datatype boolean
		used_for modifiable;

	field modified_on datatype date
		used_for modified_on;

	field modified_by links_to personnel.identity
		used_for modified_by;

	field removeflag datatype boolean
		used_for remove_flag;

	field instructions
		datatype text ( 255 );    

	field sop_reference
		datatype text(100);	

	field manufacturer
		links_to supplier.identity;

	field operator_id alias operator
		links_to personnel . identity;

	field requires_calibration
		datatype boolean;

	field calibration_plan
		datatype text ( 255 );

	field calib_contractor
		links_to supplier.identity;

	field calib_lead_time
		datatype interval
		lower_limit '0 00:00:00.00';

	field calib_sample_template
		links_to samp_tmpl_header.identity;

	field requires_servicing
		datatype boolean;

	field service_intv
		datatype interval
		lower_limit '0 00:00:00.00';

	field service_contractor
		links_to supplier.identity;

	field service_lead_time
		datatype interval
		lower_limit '0 00:00:00.00';

	field has_attachments
		datatype boolean
		used_for has_attachments ;

	field instrument_category
		links_to instrument_category . identity;

	field custom_icon
		links_to icon . identity 
		default 'INT_INST_TMP';

	field use_maintenance
		datatype boolean
		true_word 'T'
		false_word 'F'
		default 'T';

field FB_country
	links_to Fb_country.identity;
field fb_commercial_name
	datatype text ( 100 );
field FB_Metering_Instrument
	datatype boolean;	
field FB_Measuring_Range
	datatype text ( 100 );
field FB_Accuracy
	datatype text ( 100 );
field FB_Accuracy_Level
	datatype text ( 100 );
field FB_Workstation
	datatype boolean;
field workstation_name
	datatype text;
field FB_Version_No_of_Workstation_Software
	datatype text;
field FB_Output_Format
	datatype text
	prompt_type choose
    choose_type FB_OP_FO; 
field FB_Data_Output_Interface
	datatype boolean;
field FB_Type_of_Communication_Interface
		datatype text
	prompt_type choose
      	choose_type FB_COMM_TY; 
field FB_Pin
	datatype text ( 100 );
field comm_parity
	datatype identity
	prompt_type choose
	choose_type COMM_PARIT;
field comm_baud
	datatype identity
	prompt_type choose
	choose_type COMM_BAUD;
field comm_databits
	datatype integer
	default  8
	lower_limit 4
	upper_limit 8 ;
field comm_stopbits
	datatype identity
	prompt_type choose
	choose_type COMM_STOPB;
field FB_Check_Bit
	datatype text ( 100 );
field FB_Instrument_Model
	datatype text ( 100 );
field FB_Brand
	datatype text
	prompt_type choose
    choose_type FB_BRAND;
field FB_Calibration_type
	datatype text
	prompt_type choose
    choose_type FB_CAL_TYP;  
	

table instrument_part_template;

	field identity
		datatype identity

	      used_for display_browse ( 2 );

	      used_for display_browse ( 3 );

	      used_for display_browse ( 4 ), translation;

	field group_id alias group
	      used_for security_id
	      links_to group_header . identity;

	      used_for modifiable;

	      used_for modified_on
	      used_for display_browse ( 5 );

	field modified_by links_to personnel.identity
	      used_for modified_by
	      used_for display_browse ( 6 );

	field removeflag datatype boolean
	      used_for remove_flag;

	      choose_type FORM_CAT

	field workflow_node_guid   
	      datatype guid
	      used_for unique_key ;

	field workflow_id
	      links_to parent workflow . workflow_guid as workflow ;

	field workflow_version
	      links_to parent workflow . workflow_version as workflow ;

	      used_for ordering ;

	      used_for primary_browse, name ;

	      used_for display_browse ( 1 ) ;

	      datatype text ( 30 ) ;

	      datatype text ( 4000 ) ;

	      links_to workflow . workflow_guid;

	field action_table_name

	field event_type_id

	field entity_template_id
	      links_to entity_template . identity;

	field enabled 
	      datatype boolean
	      default 'Yes'
	      true_word 'Yes'
	      false_word 'No' ;

index workflow_node_parent on parent_node, order_number ;

view analyst_notebook_pages_view ;

	field target_type
	    links_to phrase . phrase_text ;
	field target_identity
	    links_to analyst_page_entity . target_identity 	;
	field notebook_title
	    links_to analyst_notebook . title 	;
	field page_title
	    links_to analyst_notebook_page . title ;

select_clause

	SELECT
		[PHRASE].[PHRASE_TEXT] AS TARGET_TYPE,
		[ANALYST_PAGE_ENTITY].[TARGET_IDENTITY] AS TARGET_IDENTITY,
		[ANALYST_NOTEBOOK].[TITLE] AS NOTEBOOK_TITLE,
		[ANALYST_NOTEBOOK_PAGE].[TITLE] AS PAGE_TITLE
	FROM
		[ANALYST_NOTEBOOK] INNER JOIN
		[ANALYST_NOTEBOOK_PAGE] ON [ANALYST_NOTEBOOK].[NOTEBOOK_GUID] = [ANALYST_NOTEBOOK_PAGE].[ANALYST_NOTEBOOK_GUID] INNER JOIN
		[ANALYST_PAGE_ENTITY] INNER JOIN
		[PHRASE] ON [ANALYST_PAGE_ENTITY].[TARGET_TYPE] = [PHRASE].[PHRASE_ID]  ON [ANALYST_NOTEBOOK_PAGE].[PAGE_GUID] = [ANALYST_PAGE_ENTITY].[PAGE_GUID]
	WHERE 
		[PHRASE].[PHRASE_TYPE] LIKE 'ANPAGEENT';

view audit_review_view;

	    field event links_to audit_event . event used_for unique_key,primary_browse ;
	    field transaction  links_to audit_event . transaction used_for unique_key,display_browse(2) ;
	    field table_name links_to audit_event . table_name used_for display_browse(3);
	    field record_key0 links_to audit_event . record_key0 used_for display_browse(4);
	    field record_name links_to audit_event . record_name used_for display_browse(5);
	    field event_action links_to audit_event . event_action used_for display_browse(6);
	    field event_reason links_to audit_event . event_reason used_for display_browse(7);
	    field system_pid links_to audit_transaction . system_pid used_for display_browse(8);
	    field user_id links_to audit_transaction . user_id used_for display_browse(9);
	    field transaction_date links_to audit_transaction . transaction_date used_for display_browse(10);
	    field session_id links_to audit_transaction . session_id used_for display_browse(11);
	    field transaction_name links_to audit_transaction . transaction_name used_for display_browse(12);
	    field review_id links_to audit_review . review_id used_for display_browse(13);
	    field change_identifier links_to audit_review . change_identifier used_for display_browse(14); 
	    field project links_to audit_review . project used_for display_browse(15); 
	    field comments links_to audit_review . comments used_for display_browse(16);
	    field passed_review links_to audit_review . passed_review used_for display_browse(17);
	    field failed_review links_to audit_review . failed_review used_for display_browse(18);
	    field reviewed_by links_to audit_review . reviewed_by used_for display_browse(19);
	    field review_state links_to audit_review . review_state used_for display_browse(20);
	    field stored_fingerprint links_to audit_review . stored_fingerprint ;
	    field remove_flag links_to audit_review . remove_flag used_for remove_flag ;

select_clause

	SELECT
	    AE.EVENT, 
	    AE.[TRANSACTION],
	    AE.TABLE_NAME, 
	    AE.RECORD_KEY0, 
	    AE.RECORD_NAME, 
	    AE.EVENT_ACTION,
	    AE.EVENT_REASON, 
	    AT.SYSTEM_PID, 
	    AT.USER_ID, 
	    AT.TRANSACTION_DATE, 
	    AT.SESSION_ID, 
	    AT.TRANSACTION_NAME, 
	    COALESCE(AR.review_id,''), 
	    COALESCE(AR.CHANGE_IDENTIFIER, ''),
	    COALESCE(AR.PROJECT,''),
	    COALESCE(AR.COMMENTS,''),
	    COALESCE(AR.PASSED_REVIEW,'F'),
	    COALESCE(AR.FAILED_REVIEW,'F'),
	    COALESCE(AR.REVIEWED_BY,''),
	    COALESCE(AR.REVIEW_STATE,'N'),
	    COALESCE(AR.STORED_FINGERPRINT,''),
	    COALESCE(AR.REMOVE_FLAG,'F')
	FROM 
	    AUDIT_EVENT AE FULL OUTER JOIN
	    AUDIT_TRANSACTION AT ON AE.[TRANSACTION] = AT.[TRANSACTION] FULL OUTER JOIN
	    AUDIT_REVIEW AR ON AE.EVENT = AR.EVENT
	    WHERE  (AE.TABLE_NAME NOT IN ('BATCH_HEADER','JOB_HEADER','SAMPLE','TEST','RESULT','PASSWORD','ACTIVITY_LOG','ACCESS_LOG'));

{Start Added by DG on 14th Mar View created for identify the inspection request which stored and inspected using storage container }
view fb_storage_container_inspection_sample on_table sample, fb_storage_container;

field   sample
      links_to sample . id_numeric 
	used_for unique_key;
field storage_identity
	links_to fb_storage_container.identity 
	used_for unique_key, display_browse(1);
field silo_no
	links_to sample.fb_silo_no
	used_for unique_key;
field tank
	links_to sample.fb_tank
	used_for unique_key;	
field creation_date
	links_to sample.login_date;	
field production_date
	links_to sample.fb_production_date;
field unloading_date
	links_to sample.fb_unloading_date;	
field blending_date
	links_to sample.fb_blending_date;
field factory_material_identity
	links_to sample.fb_factory_material as fb_material_code;
field factory_material_code
	links_to sample.fb_factory_code as fb_material_code;
field material_description
	links_to sample.fb_material_description;
field job_id
	links_to job_header.job_name
	used_for unique_key;
field inspection_request_lot_id
	links_to fb_inspection_request_lot.inspection_request_lot_id 
	used_for unique_key, display_browse(2);
field business_number
	links_to fb_inspection_request_lot.business_number;
field incoming_date
	links_to sample.fb_incoming_date;
field tank_storage_date
	links_to sample.fb_tank_storage;
field sample_id_text
	links_to sample . id_text;
select_clause
      SELECT
	  
			  sample.[id_numeric],
              	  fb_storage_container . [identity],
			  sample.fb_silo_no,
			  sample.fb_tank,
			  sample.login_date,
			  sample.fb_production_date,
			  sample.fb_unloading_date,
			  sample.fb_blending_date,
			sample.fb_factory_material,
			sample.fb_factory_code,
			sample.fb_material_description,
			job_header.job_name, 
              fb_inspection_request_lot . inspection_request_lot_id,
		  fb_inspection_request_lot . business_number,
			  sample.fb_incoming_date,
			  sample.fb_tank_storage,
			  sample. id_text							  
      FROM
              sample, fb_storage_container, job_header, fb_inspection_request_lot 
	WHERE
		  (sample . fb_silo_no = fb_storage_container. [identity] or sample.fb_tank = fb_storage_container. [identity]) and (sample.job_name = job_header.job_name) and (job_header.fb_inspectionid = fb_inspection_request_lot.inspection_request_lot_id  ) ;

table rapid_report_template;

    field identity alias identifier
          datatype identity ( 30 )
          used_for unique_key, display_browse ( 1 ) ;

    field version
          datatype packed_decimal
          default '         1'
          used_for unique_key, version_number, display_browse ( 2 ) ;

    field title
          datatype text ( 100 )
          used_for primary_browse, name, display_browse ( 3 ) ;

    field group_id alias group
          links_to group_header.identity
          used_for security_id ;

    field description 
          datatype text ( 234 ) ;

    field modified_on 
          datatype date 
          used_for modified_on ;

    field modified_by links_to personnel.identity
          used_for modified_by ;

    field owner links_to personnel.identity
          used_for display_browse ( 4 ) ;

    field modifiable 
          datatype boolean
          used_for modifiable;

    field removeflag datatype boolean
          used_for remove_flag ;

    field has_attachments
          datatype boolean
          used_for has_attachments ;

    field active
          datatype boolean
          true_word 'True'
          false_word 'False'
          default 'True'
          used_for active_flag ;

    field active_from
          datatype date
          used_for active_start_date ;

    field active_to
          datatype date
          used_for active_end_date ;

    field inspection_plan
          links_to inspection_header . identity
          used_for inspection ;

    field approval_status
          datatype text ( 1 )
          used_for display_browse ( 7 ) , approval_status
          default 'A'
          prompt_type choose
          choose_type APPR_STAT ;

    field public_template
          datatype boolean
          used_for display_browse ( 8 ) ;

    field export 
          datatype boolean ;

    field style
          datatype identity
          default 'LIST'
          prompt_type choose
          choose_type RRTEM_STY
          used_for display_browse ( 5 ) ;

    field root_table
          datatype text ( 100 )
          used_for display_browse ( 6 ) ;

    field min 
          datatype boolean ;

    field max 
          datatype boolean ;

    field avg 
          datatype boolean ;

    field std 
          datatype boolean ;

    field var 
          datatype boolean ;


table rapid_report_template_table;

    field identity alias template_id
          links_to parent rapid_report_template.identity as rapid_report_template
          used_for unique_key ;

    field version alias template_version
          links_to parent rapid_report_template.version as rapid_report_template
          used_for unique_key ;

    field table_name
          datatype text ( 100 )
          used_for unique_key ;

    field field 
          datatype text ( 80 ) ;

    field link_table 
          datatype text ( 80 ) ;

    field link_field 
          datatype text ( 80 ) ;

    field join_mode
          datatype identity
          default 'LEFT'
          prompt_type choose
          choose_type RRTEM_T_M ;

    field order_number 
          datatype packed_decimal
          used_for ordering ;


table rapid_report_template_filter ;

    field identity alias template_id
          links_to parent rapid_report_template.identity as rapid_report_template
          used_for unique_key ;

    field version alias template_version
          links_to parent rapid_report_template.version as rapid_report_template
          used_for unique_key ;

    field connect_type
          datatype text ( 100 ) ;

    field table_name
          datatype text ( 100 )
          used_for unique_key ;

    field field
          datatype text ( 100 ) ;

    field operator
          datatype identity
          default 'EQUAL'
          prompt_type choose
          choose_type RRTEM_F_O;

    field value
          datatype text ( 200 );

    field order_number 
          datatype packed_decimal
          used_for unique_key, ordering;

    field criteria
          links_to criteria_saved . identity as criteria_saved ;
        
    field criteria_tablename
          links_to criteria_saved . table_name as criteria_saved ;


table rapid_report_template_field;

    field identity alias template_id
          links_to parent rapid_report_template.identity as rapid_report_template
          used_for unique_key ;
          
    field version alias template_version
          links_to parent rapid_report_template.version as rapid_report_template
          used_for unique_key ;

    field table_name
          datatype text ( 100 )
          used_for unique_key ;
          
    field field
          datatype text ( 100 ) ;

    field show_name
          datatype text ( 100 ) ;

    field output
          datatype boolean
          true_word 'True'
          false_word 'False'
          default 'True' ;

    field type
          datatype identity
          default 'ROW'
          prompt_type choose
          choose_type RRTEM_F_T ;

    field order_type
          datatype identity
          prompt_type choose
          choose_type RRTEM_T_O ;

    field order_number 
          datatype packed_decimal
          used_for unique_key, ordering;


table rapid_report_export_settings;

    field identity alias template_id
          links_to rapid_report_template.identity as rapid_report_template
          used_for unique_key, display_browse ( 1 ) ;

    field version alias template_version
          links_to rapid_report_template.version as rapid_report_template
          used_for unique_key, display_browse ( 2 ) ;

    field group_id alias group
          links_to group_header.identity
          used_for security_id;

    field mail_printer
          links_to printer.identity
          used_for unique_key , display_browse ( 3 ) ;

    field description 
          datatype text ( 234 )
          used_for display_browse ( 4 ) ;

    field modified_on datatype date used_for modified_on ;

    field modified_by links_to personnel.identity
          used_for modified_by;

    field modifiable datatype boolean
          used_for modifiable;

    field removeflag datatype boolean
          used_for remove_flag;

    field file_type 
          default 'CSV'
          datatype text ( 5 );

    field active
          datatype boolean
          true_word 'True'
          false_word 'False'
          default 'True'
          used_for active_flag, display_browse ( 7 ) ;

    field last_export_date
          datatype date
          default NULL 
          used_for display_browse ( 6 ) ; 

    field export_frequency
          datatype text ( 500 )
          default 'TIME=(0:00)' 
          used_for display_browse ( 5 ) ;

view c_samp_test_result
    parent_view samp_test_result
    tableset default_table_set ;

view sqcwin_c_samp_test_result on_table sample,
                                        test,
                                        result,
                                        c_samp_test_result;

        field id_numeric
              used_for unique_key, display_browse(1)
              links_to sample.id_numeric;
        field test_number
              used_for unique_key, display_browse(2)
              links_to test .test_number;
        field component_name
              used_for unique_key, display_browse(4)
              links_to component_view.name;
        field job_name
              links_to sample.job_name;
        field id_text
              links_to sample.id_text;
        field status
              links_to sample.status;
        field sample_old_status
              links_to sample.old_status;
        field compared
              links_to sample.compared;
        field on_spec
              links_to sample.on_spec;
        field re_sampled
              links_to sample.re_sampled;
        field original_sample
              links_to sample.original_sample;
        field link_number
              links_to sample.link_number;
        field login_date
              links_to sample.login_date;
        field login_by
              links_to sample.login_by;
        field sampled_date
              links_to sample.sampled_date;
        field recd_date
              links_to sample.recd_date;
        field date_started
              links_to sample.date_started;
        field starter
              links_to sample.starter;
        field dateresreq
              links_to sample.dateresreq;
        field date_completed
              links_to sample.date_completed;
        field completer
              links_to sample.completer;
        field dateresavail
              links_to sample.dateresavail;
        field sample_date_authorised
              links_to sample.date_authorised;
        field authoriser
              links_to sample.authoriser;
        field authorisation_notes
              links_to sample.authorisation_notes;
        field product
              links_to sample.product;
        field product_version
              links_to sample.product_version;
        field grade_code
              links_to sample.grade_code;
        field tests_to_do
              links_to sample.tests_to_do;
        field on_wks
              links_to sample.on_wks;
        field project_id
              links_to sample.project_id;
        field batch_name
              links_to sample.batch_name;
        field sampling_point
              links_to sample.sampling_point;
        field sample_type
              links_to sample.sample_type;
        field sample_name
              links_to sample.sample_name;
        field description
              links_to sample.description;
        field preparation
              links_to sample.preparation;
        field hazard

              links_to sample.substance;
        field priority
              links_to sample.priority;
        field location_id
              links_to sample.location;
        field customer_id
              links_to sample.customer_id;
        field invoice_number
              links_to sample.invoice_number;

              links_to sample.test_schedule;
        field template_id
              links_to sample.template_id;
        field comp_prod_name
              links_to sample.comp_prod_name;
        field comp_prod_ver
              links_to sample.comp_prod_ver;
        field comp_prod_grade
              links_to sample.comp_prod_grade;
        field standard
              links_to sample.standard;
        field batch_id
              links_to sample.batch_id;
        field analysis
              used_for display_browse(3)
              links_to test.analysis;
        field test_status
              links_to test.status;
        field instrument
              links_to test.instrument;
        field replicate_test
              links_to test . replicate_test;
        field test_count
              links_to test . test_count ;
        field result_type
              links_to result.result_type;
        field result_status
              links_to result.status;
        field result_text
              links_to result.text;

table sqcwin_header ;

	field identifier
		  alias identity
		  datatype identity (20)
		  used_for unique_key , display_browse(1) ;
		  
	field chart_id
		  datatype identity (10)
		  used_for display_browse(2) ;
		  
	field Name
		  datatype text (100)
		  used_for name, primary_browse;
		  
	field default_chart
		  datatype identity
		  prompt_type phrase
		  valid 
		  identities
		  phrase_type SQC_CHART;
		  
	field criteria_identity
			links_to criteria_saved.identity;
			
	field has_attachments
		  datatype boolean
		  used_for has_attachments ;
		  
	field spare_id
		  datatype text (10) ;
		  
	field created_on
		  datatype date ;
		  
	field created_by
		  links_to personnel.identity ;
		  
	field modified_on
		  datatype date
		  used_for modified_on ;
		  
	field modified_by
		  links_to personnel.identity
		  used_for modified_by ;
		  
	field modifiable
		  datatype boolean
		  used_for modifiable ;
		  
	field removeflag
		  datatype boolean
		  used_for remove_flag ;
		  
	field modifiable_inView
		  datatype boolean;
		  
	field group_id
		  links_to group_header.identity
		  used_for security_id ;
		  
	field description
		  datatype text (234)
		  used_for display_browse (3) ;
		  
	field group_id_type
		  datatype integer ;
		  
	field subgroup_size_wanted
		  datatype integer ;
		  
	field test_length
		  datatype integer ;
		  
	field product_name
		  links_to mlp_header . identity ;
		  
	field product_version
		  links_to mlp_header . product_version ;
		  
	field start_date
		  datatype date ;
		  
	field end_date
		  datatype date ;
		  
	field sample_criteria_1

	field sample_criteria_2

table sqcwin_subgroup ;

	field chart_id
		  links_to sqcwin_header.identifier
		  used_for unique_key ;

	field chart_type_id 
		  datatype identity
		  default '0'
		  used_for unique_key ;

	field subgroup_number
		  datatype text (4)
		  used_for unique_key ;

	field first_point
		  datatype text (6) ;
		  
	field subgroup_date
		  datatype date ;
		  
	field subgroup_size
		  datatype integer ;
		  
	field discrete_n
		  datatype integer ;
		  
	field group_name
		  datatype integer ;
		  
	field x_bar
		  alias median , P , I , number_defective , fraction_defective
		  datatype real ;
		  
	field range
		  alias moving_range , concentration
		  datatype real ;
		  
	field sigma
		  alias industrial_range
		  datatype real ;
		  
	field running_average
		  datatype real ;
		  
	field a_plot
		  datatype boolean ;
		  
	field a_bad
		  datatype boolean ;
		  
	field a_bad_manual
		  datatype boolean ;
		  
	field trend_a
		  datatype integer ;
		  
	field trend_a_p
		  datatype integer ;
		  
	field trend_a_1
		  datatype real ;
		  
	field trend_a_2
		  datatype integer ;
		  
	field discrete_sigma
		  datatype real ;
		  
	field b_plot
		  datatype boolean ;
		  
	field b_bad
		  datatype boolean ;
		  
	field b_bad_manual
		  datatype boolean ;
		  
	field trend_b
		  datatype integer ;
		  
	field trend_b_p

view stb_mlp_analysis_view on_table mlp_header,
                                    mlp_components,
                                    analysis_view ;

	field product_id
	      links_to mlp_header.identity 
	      used_for unique_key ;

	field product_version
	      links_to mlp_header.product_version
	      used_for unique_key, version_number ;

	field analysis_id
	      links_to mlp_components . analysis_id
	      used_for unique_key, display_browse ;

	field analysis_name
	      links_to analysis_view. identity
	      used_for display_browse ;

	field analysis_description
	      links_to analysis_view.description
	      used_for display_browse ;

	field name
	      links_to mlp_header . name ;

ORACLE_SPECIFIC_SELECT

    select distinct mh.identity, 
                    mh.product_version,
                    av.identity,
                    av.name ,
                    av.description,
                    mh.name 
      from mlp_header mh, 
           mlp_components mc, 
           analysis_view av
     where mc.product_id = mh.identity
       and mc.product_version = mh.product_version
       and mc.analysis_id = av.identity;

SQLSERVER_SPECIFIC_SELECT

    select distinct mh.[identity], 
                    mh.product_version,
                    av.[identity],
                    av.name ,
                    av.description,
                    mh.name 
      from mlp_header mh, 
           mlp_components mc, 
           analysis_view av
     where mc.product_id = mh.[identity]
       and mc.product_version = mh.product_version
       and mc.analysis_id = av.[identity];

POSTGRESQL_SPECIFIC_SELECT

    select distinct mh.identity, 
                    mh.product_version,
                    av.identity,
                    av.name ,
                    av.description,
                    mh.name 
      from mlp_header mh, 
           mlp_components mc, 
           analysis_view av
     where mc.product_id = mh.identity
       and mc.product_version = mh.product_version
       and mc.analysis_id = av.identity;

table stb_test_group ;

	      datatype identity ( 30 )
	      used_for unique_key, display_browse ( 1 ) ;

	      used_for security_id ;

	      used_for display_browse ( 4 ) , approval_status
	      default 'A'
	      prompt_type choose
	      choose_type APPR_STAT ;

	field has_attachments

	      used_for has_attachments ;

	field modified_on
	      datatype date
	      used_for modified_on ;

	field modified_by
	      links_to personnel . identity
	      used_for modified_by ;

	      datatype boolean
	      used_for modifiable ;

	      datatype boolean
	      used_for remove_flag ;

	      used_for inspection ;

	      true_word 'True'
	      false_word 'False'
	      default 'True'
	      used_for active_flag ;

	      datatype date
	      used_for active_start_date ;

	      used_for active_end_date ;

 view stb_study_template_for_approve ;

	field study_template
	      links_to stb_study_tmpl_cell_link . studytemplate_id
	      used_for unique_key, display_browse ( 1 ) ;

	field approval_status_template
	      links_to stb_study_template . approval_status
	      used_for display_browse ( 2 ) ;

	field template_description
	      links_to stb_study_template . description
	      used_for display_browse ( 3 ) ;

	field master_template
	      links_to stb_study_tmpl_cell_link . studytemplate_id ;

ORACLE_SPECIFIC_SELECT

   select
     DISTINCT
     stcl.studytemplate_id,
     st.approval_status,
     st.description,
     stcl.studytemplate_id
   from
     stb_study_tmpl_cell_link stcl,
     stb_study_template st
   where
     st.identity = stcl.studytemplate_id
     and st.study_template_version = stcl.studytemplate_version
     and st.approval_status in ('V', 'I')
   union
   select 
     DISTINCT
     stcl.linked_study_template,
     st.approval_status,
     st.description,
     stcl.studytemplate_id
   from 
     stb_study_tmpl_cell_link stcl,
     stb_study_template st,
     stb_study_template st2
   where
     st.identity = stcl.studytemplate_id
     and st2.identity = stcl.studytemplate_id
     and st.approval_status in ('V', 'I')
     and st2.approval_status in ('V', 'I');

SQLSERVER_SPECIFIC_SELECT

   select
     DISTINCT
     stcl.studytemplate_id,
     st.approval_status,
     st.description,
     stcl.studytemplate_id
   from 
     stb_study_tmpl_cell_link stcl,
     stb_study_template st
   where
     st.[identity] = stcl.studytemplate_id
     and st.study_template_version = stcl.studytemplate_version
     and st.approval_status in ('V', 'I')
   union
   select 
     DISTINCT
     stcl.linked_study_template,
     st.approval_status,
     st.description,
     stcl.studytemplate_id
   from 
     stb_study_tmpl_cell_link stcl,
     stb_study_template st,
     stb_study_template st2
   where
     st.[identity] = stcl.studytemplate_id
     and st2.[identity] = stcl.studytemplate_id
     and st.approval_status in ('V', 'I')
     and st2.approval_status in ('V', 'I');

POSTGRESQL_SPECIFIC_SELECT

   select
     DISTINCT
     stcl.studytemplate_id,
     st.approval_status,
     st.description,
     stcl.studytemplate_id
   from
     stb_study_tmpl_cell_link stcl,
     stb_study_template st
   where
     st.identity = stcl.studytemplate_id
     and st.study_template_version = stcl.studytemplate_version
     and st.approval_status in ('V', 'I')
   union
   select 
     DISTINCT
     stcl.linked_study_template,
     st.approval_status,
     st.description,
     stcl.studytemplate_id
   from 
     stb_study_tmpl_cell_link stcl,
     stb_study_template st,
     stb_study_template st2
   where
     st.identity = stcl.studytemplate_id
     and st2.identity = stcl.studytemplate_id
     and st.approval_status in ('V', 'I')
     and st2.approval_status in ('V', 'I');

table stb_validation_rule ;

	field rule_id
	      datatype identity ( 20 )
	      used_for unique_key, display_browse ( 1 ) ;

	field rule_name
	      datatype text ( 100 )
	      used_for primary_browse, name ;

	field table_name
	      datatype text ( 30 )
	      used_for display_browse ( 2 ) ;

	field rule_type
	      datatype identity
	      prompt_type choose
	      choose_type STB_VALRUL
	      default 'STANDARD' ;

	field rule_scope_is_template
	      datatype boolean
	      true_word 'TEMPLATE'
	      false_word 'STUDY'
	      default 'TEMPLATE' ;

	field section
	      datatype text ( 25 ) ;

	field severity
	      datatype text ( 25 ) ;

	field formula
	      datatype text ( 500 ) ;

	field issue_message
	      datatype text ( 150 ) ;

	field description
	      datatype text ( 512 )
	      used_for display_browse ( 3 ) ;

	field group_id
	      links_to group_header . identity
	      used_for security_id ;

	field modified_on
	      datatype date
	      used_for modified_on ;

	field modified_by
	      links_to personnel . identity
	      used_for modified_by ;

	field modifiable
	      datatype boolean
	      used_for modifiable ;

	field removeflag
	      datatype boolean
	      used_for remove_flag ;

	field workflow_node  
	      links_to workflow_node . workflow_node_guid ;

	field has_attachments
	      datatype boolean
	      used_for has_attachments ;

view stb_study_for_approve ;

	field study
	      links_to stb_study_cell_link . study_id
	      used_for unique_key, display_browse ( 1 ) ;

	field approval_status_template
	      links_to stb_study . study_status
	      used_for display_browse ( 2 ) ;

	field template_description
	      links_to stb_study . description
	      used_for display_browse ( 3 ) ;

	field master_template
	      links_to stb_study_cell_link . study_id ;

 ORACLE_SPECIFIC_SELECT

   select 
     DISTINCT 
     stcl.study_id, 
     st.study_status,
     st.description,
     stcl.study_id
   from 
     stb_study_cell_link stcl,
     stb_study st
   where
     st.IDENTITY = stcl.study_id
     and st.study_version = stcl.study_version
     and st.study_status in ('V', 'I')
   union
   select 
     DISTINCT
     stcl.linked_study,
     st.study_status,
     st.description,
     stcl.study_id
   from 
     stb_study_cell_link stcl,
     stb_study st,
     stb_study st2
   where
     st.IDENTITY = stcl.study_id
     and st.study_version = stcl.study_version
     and st2.IDENTITY = stcl.study_id
     and st.study_status in ('V', 'I')
     and st2.study_status in ('V', 'I');

 SQLSERVER_SPECIFIC_SELECT

   select 
     DISTINCT
     stcl.study_id,
     st.study_status,
     st.description,
     stcl.study_id
   from
     stb_study_cell_link stcl,
     stb_study st
   where
     st.[IDENTITY] = stcl.study_id
     and st.study_version = stcl.study_version
     and st.study_status in ('V', 'I')
   union
   select 
     DISTINCT
     stcl.linked_study,
     st.study_status,
     st.description,
     stcl.study_id
   from 
     stb_study_cell_link stcl,
     stb_study st,
     stb_study st2
   where
     st.[IDENTITY] = stcl.study_id
     and st.study_version = stcl.study_version
     and st2.[IDENTITY] = stcl.study_id
     and st.study_status in ('V', 'I')
     and st2.study_status in ('V', 'I');

 POSTGRESQL_SPECIFIC_SELECT

   select 
     DISTINCT 
     stcl.study_id, 
     st.study_status,
     st.description,
     stcl.study_id
   from 
     stb_study_cell_link stcl,
     stb_study st
   where
     st.IDENTITY = stcl.study_id
     and st.study_version = stcl.study_version
     and st.study_status in ('V', 'I')
   union
   select 
     DISTINCT
     stcl.linked_study,
     st.study_status,
     st.description,
     stcl.study_id
   from 
     stb_study_cell_link stcl,
     stb_study st,
     stb_study st2
   where
     st.IDENTITY = stcl.study_id
     and st.study_version = stcl.study_version
     and st2.IDENTITY = stcl.study_id
     and st.study_status in ('V', 'I')
     and st2.study_status in ('V', 'I');

view stb_study_article_check_view ;

	field article
	      links_to stb_article_pack_sys . article_p
	      used_for unique_key, display_browse ( 1 ) ;

	field article_version
	      links_to stb_article_pack_sys . version_p
	      used_for unique_key, display_browse ( 2 ) ;

	field packaging_system
	      links_to stb_article_pack_sys . packaging_system
	      used_for unique_key, display_browse ( 3 ) ;

	field amount_per_container
	      links_to stb_article_pack_sys . amount_per_container
	      used_for display_browse ( 4 ) ;

	field release_spec_id
	      links_to stb_article_pack_sys . release_spec_id
	      used_for unique_key ;

	field release_spec_version
	      links_to stb_article_pack_sys . release_spec_version
	       used_for unique_key ;

	field shelf_life_spec_id
	      links_to stb_article_pack_sys . shelf_life_spec_id
	      used_for unique_key ;

	field shelf_life_spec_version
	      links_to stb_article_pack_sys . shelf_life_spec_version
	      used_for unique_key ;

	field level_id
	      links_to mlp_level . level_id
	      used_for unique_key ;
 
ORACLE_SPECIFIC_SELECT

select  aps.article_p,
        aps.version_p,
        aps.packaging_system,
        aps.amount_per_container,
        aps.release_spec_id,
        aps.release_spec_version,
        aps.shelf_life_spec_id,
        aps.shelf_life_spec_version,
        mv.level_id 
from stb_article_pack_sys aps,
     mlp_values mv,
     mlp_header mh 
where mv.entry_code = mh.entry_code
  and ( (aps.release_spec_id = mh.identity and aps.release_spec_version = mh.product_version)
         or
        (aps.shelf_life_spec_id = mh.identity and aps.shelf_life_spec_version = mh.product_version)
      ); 

SQLSERVER_SPECIFIC_SELECT

select  aps.article_p,
        aps.version_p,
        aps.packaging_system,
        aps.amount_per_container,
        aps.release_spec_id,
        aps.release_spec_version,
        aps.shelf_life_spec_id,
        aps.shelf_life_spec_version,
        mv.level_id 
from stb_article_pack_sys aps,
     mlp_values mv,
     mlp_header mh 
where mv.entry_code = mh.entry_code
  and ( (aps.release_spec_id = mh.[identity] and aps.release_spec_version = mh.product_version)
         or
        (aps.shelf_life_spec_id = mh.[identity] and aps.shelf_life_spec_version = mh.product_version)
      );

POSTGRESQL_SPECIFIC_SELECT

select  aps.article_p,
        aps.version_p,
        aps.packaging_system,
        aps.amount_per_container,
        aps.release_spec_id,
        aps.release_spec_version,
        aps.shelf_life_spec_id,
        aps.shelf_life_spec_version,
        mv.level_id 
from stb_article_pack_sys aps,
     mlp_values mv,
     mlp_header mh 
where mv.entry_code = mh.entry_code
  and ( (aps.release_spec_id = mh.identity and aps.release_spec_version = mh.product_version)
         or
        (aps.shelf_life_spec_id = mh.identity and aps.shelf_life_spec_version = mh.product_version)
      );

	      choose_type STB_PLSTAT ;

	      links_to group_header.identity
	      used_for security_id ;

	      used_for modified_on ;

	      links_to personnel.identity
	      used_for modified_by ;

	      used_for modifiable ;

	      datatype boolean
	      used_for remove_flag ;

	field end_date 
	      datatype date ;

	      default 'CD0C6014-5A70-4E40-B9FE-87D58FFC5DD4'

	      default 'DEFAULT_PICKLIST_PULLS' ;

	field linked_criteria

	      default 'DEFAULT_PICKLIST_LINKS' ;

	      datatype text ( 234 ) ;

      	used_for remove_flag;

		datatype boolean;

{New - Added for Personnel Group folder - Andy 20231107}
view fb_view_grouplink; {New - Added for Personnel Group folder - Andy 20231107}
	field operator_id links_to grouplink.operator_id used_for unique_key;
	field group_id links_to grouplink.group_id used_for unique_key;
	field group_security links_to personnel.group_id used_for security_id;

select_clause

      SELECT
		personnel . [identity],
		grouplink . group_id,
		personnel . group_id

      FROM
		personnel, grouplink
      WHERE 
		personnel.[identity] = grouplink.operator_id and personnel.removeflag = 'F';
		
		
{New - Added for Personnel role folder - Andy 20231110}

view fb_view_operator_roles; {New - Added for Personnel Role folder - Andy 20231110}
	field operator_id links_to role_assignment.operator_id used_for unique_key, primary_browse;
	field group_id links_to role_assignment.group_id used_for unique_key;
	field role_id links_to role_assignment.role_id used_for unique_key, display_browse ( 1 );
	field group_security links_to personnel.group_id used_for security_id, display_browse ( 2 );

select_clause

      SELECT
		personnel . [identity],
		role_assignment . group_id,
		role_assignment . role_id,
		personnel . group_id

      FROM
		personnel, role_assignment
      WHERE 
		personnel.[identity] = role_assignment.operator_id and personnel.removeflag = 'F';

table FB_JOB_STK_BATCH;
	
	field Job_name
		links_to Job_header.Job_name
		used_for unique_key;
	field Stock
		links_to parent Stock_batch.stock as Linked_Stock_batch;
	field Stock_batch
		links_to parent Stock_batch.stock_batch as Linked_Stock_batch;
	field Order_number
		datatype integer
		used_for ordering;
	field Std_type
		datatype text
		prompt_type choose
	    	choose_type FB_SOL_STD;
	field Standardization_date
		datatype date;

	field Val_Stock
		links_to Stock_batch.stock as Validation_Stock_batch;
	field Val_Stock_batch
		links_to Stock_batch.stock_batch as Validation_Stock_batch;

{Added for Non Functional Requirements on 21-Dec-2023}

view viewer_audit_view
	on_table audit_data, audit_event, audit_transaction, person, personnel;

	field transaction_id
	      links_to audit_transaction . transaction
	      used_for unique_key, primary_browse;

	field table_name
	      links_to audit_event . table_name
	      used_for unique_key, display_browse (1);

	field record_key0
	      links_to audit_event . record_key0
	      used_for unique_key, display_browse (2);

	field data
	      links_to audit_data . data
	      used_for unique_key, display_browse (3);

	field field
	      links_to audit_data . field
	      used_for unique_key, display_browse (4);

	field value_before
	      links_to audit_data . value_before
	      used_for display_browse (5);

	field value_after
	      links_to audit_data . value_after
	      used_for display_browse (6);

	field user_id
	      links_to audit_transaction . user_id
	      used_for display_browse (7);

	field data_reason
	      links_to audit_data . data_reason
	      used_for display_browse (8);

	field transaction_date
	      links_to audit_transaction . transaction_date
	      used_for display_browse (9);
	
	field pt_transaction_name
	      links_to audit_transaction . transaction_name
	      used_for display_browse (10);

	field pt_event_action
	      links_to audit_event . event_action
	      used_for display_browse (11);

	field pt_user_group
	      links_to personnel . group_id
	      used_for display_browse (12);

	field pt_event_reason
	      links_to audit_event . event_reason
	      used_for display_browse (13);

oracle_specific_select

SELECT
              AUDIT_TRANSACTION    . TRANSACTION ,
              AUDIT_EVENT 		. TABLE_NAME ,
              AUDIT_EVENT 		. RECORD_KEY0 ,
	         AUDIT_DATA 		. DATA ,
	         AUDIT_DATA 		. FIELD ,
              AUDIT_DATA  		. VALUE_BEFORE ,
              AUDIT_DATA  		. VALUE_AFTER ,
		    AUDIT_TRANSACTION . USER_ID ,
		    AUDIT_DATA 		. DATA_REASON ,
		    AUDIT_TRANSACTION . TRANSACTION_DATE,
		    AUDIT_TRANSACTION . TRANSACTION_NAME,
              AUDIT_EVENT .EVENT_ACTION,
		    PERSONNEL.GROUP_ID,
		    AUDIT_EVENT .EVENT_REASON
      FROM
              audit_transaction , audit_event , audit_data, personnel
      WHERE
              audit_transaction . transaction = audit_event . transaction AND
              audit_event . event = audit_data . event AND
		    audit_transaction . user_id = personnel.identity;

sqlserver_specific_select

SELECT
              AUDIT_TRANSACTION . [TRANSACTION] ,
              AUDIT_EVENT 		. TABLE_NAME ,
              AUDIT_EVENT 		. RECORD_KEY0 ,
	         AUDIT_DATA 		. DATA ,
	         AUDIT_DATA 		. FIELD ,
              AUDIT_DATA  		. VALUE_BEFORE ,
              AUDIT_DATA  		. VALUE_AFTER ,
		    AUDIT_TRANSACTION . USER_ID ,
		    AUDIT_DATA 		. DATA_REASON ,
		    AUDIT_TRANSACTION . TRANSACTION_DATE,
		    AUDIT_TRANSACTION . TRANSACTION_NAME,
              AUDIT_EVENT .EVENT_ACTION,
		    PERSONNEL.GROUP_ID,
		    AUDIT_EVENT .EVENT_REASON
      FROM
              audit_transaction , audit_event , audit_data, personnel
      WHERE
              audit_transaction . [transaction] = audit_event . [transaction] AND
              audit_event . event = audit_data . event AND
		    audit_transaction . user_id = personnel.[identity];

table viewer_review_transaction;

	field transaction
	      datatype packed_decimal
	      used_for unique_key, primary_browse;

	      datatype text (8);

	      datatype text (234)
	      used_for display_browse (1);
