	      datatype date;

	field session_id
	      links_to access_log . session_id;

index review_session_id on session_id;

table viewer_review_event;

	field event
	      datatype packed_decimal
	      used_for unique_key, primary_browse, display_browse (2);

	field transaction
	      links_to viewer_review_transaction . transaction
	      used_for unique_key, display_browse (1);

	field user_id
	      links_to personnel . identity
	      used_for display_browse (3);

	field viewer_configuration
	      links_to viewer_configuration . identity
	      used_for display_browse (4);

	field review_comment
	      datatype text (255)
	      default NULL
	      used_for display_browse (5);

index review_event_table_no_index on viewer_configuration, transaction;

table viewer_review_entity;

	field event
	      links_to viewer_review_event . event
	      used_for unique_key, primary_browse;

	field review_data
	      datatype packed_decimal
	      used_for unique_key, display_browse (1);

	field table_name
	      datatype text (30)
	      used_for display_browse (2);

	field record_key0
	      datatype text (255)
	      case_sensitive
	      used_for display_browse (3);

index review_field_index on event, table_name, record_key0;


view pt_audit_trail_transaction on_table audit_transaction    ,
								  audit_event		   ,
								  personnel            ;

	field 	transaction_id
			links_to audit_transaction . transaction
			used_for unique_key, primary_browse;

     field 	record_key0
			links_to audit_event . record_key0
			used_for unique_key, display_browse ( 1 );

	field 	table_name
			links_to audit_event . table_name
			used_for unique_key, display_browse ( 2 );

	field 	user_id
			links_to audit_transaction . user_id
			used_for display_browse ( 3 );

     field 	event_action
			links_to audit_event. event_action
			used_for display_browse ( 4 );

     field 	user_group
			links_to personnel. group_id
               used_for display_browse ( 5 );

	field 	transaction_name
			links_to audit_transaction . transaction_name
			used_for display_browse ( 6 );

	field 	transaction_date
			links_to audit_transaction . transaction_date
			used_for display_browse ( 7 );

     field 	event_reason
			links_to audit_event . event_reason
			used_for display_browse ( 8 );


	sqlserver_specific_select
      SELECT
              AUDIT_TRANSACTION . [TRANSACTION] ,
		    AUDIT_EVENT . RECORD_KEY0,
		    AUDIT_EVENT . TABLE_NAME ,
		    AUDIT_TRANSACTION . USER_ID ,
              AUDIT_EVENT .EVENT_ACTION,
		    PERSONNEL.GROUP_ID,
		    AUDIT_TRANSACTION .TRANSACTION_NAME,
		    AUDIT_TRANSACTION .TRANSACTION_DATE,
		    AUDIT_EVENT .EVENT_REASON

      FROM
              audit_transaction , audit_event , personnel
      WHERE
              audit_transaction . [transaction] = audit_event . [transaction] AND
		    audit_transaction . user_id = personnel.[identity] ;

	oracle_specific_select
       SELECT
              AUDIT_TRANSACTION    . TRANSACTION ,
		    AUDIT_EVENT .  RECORD_KEY0,
 		    AUDIT_EVENT . TABLE_NAME ,
		    AUDIT_TRANSACTION . USER_ID ,
              AUDIT_EVENT .EVENT_ACTION,
		    PERSONNEL.GROUP_ID,
 		    AUDIT_TRANSACTION .TRANSACTION_NAME,
		    AUDIT_TRANSACTION .TRANSACTION_DATE,
              AUDIT_EVENT .EVENT_REASON

      FROM
              audit_transaction , audit_event , personnel
      WHERE
              audit_transaction . transaction = audit_event . transaction AND
		    audit_transaction . user_id = personnel.identity ;

view viewer_review_view on_table viewer_review_transaction,
								 viewer_review_event	  ,
								 viewer_review_entity	  ;

field 	transaction_id
		links_to viewer_review_transaction . transaction
		used_for unique_key, primary_browse;

field 	table_name
		links_to viewer_review_entity . table_name
		used_for unique_key, display_browse ( 1 );

field 	record_key0
		links_to viewer_review_entity . record_key0
		used_for unique_key, display_browse ( 2 );

field 	review_comment
		links_to viewer_review_event . review_comment
		used_for display_browse ( 3 );

field 	user_id
		links_to viewer_review_event . user_id
		used_for display_browse ( 4 );

field 	transaction_date
		links_to viewer_review_transaction . transaction_date
		used_for display_browse ( 5 );

field	viewer_configuration
		links_to viewer_review_event . viewer_configuration
		used_for  display_browse ( 6 ) ;

select_clause

      SELECT
              viewer_review_transaction . [TRANSACTION] ,
              viewer_review_entity 		. TABLE_NAME ,
              viewer_review_entity 		. RECORD_KEY0 ,
			  viewer_review_event 		. REVIEW_COMMENT ,
			  viewer_review_event		. USER_ID ,
			  viewer_review_transaction . TRANSACTION_DATE,
			  viewer_review_event 		. VIEWER_CONFIGURATION
      FROM
              viewer_review_transaction , viewer_review_event , viewer_review_entity
      WHERE
              viewer_review_transaction . [transaction] = viewer_review_event . [transaction] AND
              viewer_review_event . event = viewer_review_entity . event ;

	      datatype guid
	      used_for unique_key, display_browse (1);

	      used_for primary_browse, name;

	field description
	      datatype text (255)
	      used_for display_browse (2);

	field modified_on
	      datatype date
	      used_for modified_on;

	field modified_by
	      links_to personnel . identity
	      used_for modified_by;

	field modifiable
	      datatype boolean
	      used_for modifiable;

	field group_id alias group
      	links_to group_header.identity
      	used_for security_id;

	field approval_status
      	datatype text ( 1 )
      	used_for display_browse ( 4 ) , approval_status
      	default 'A'
      	prompt_type choose
      	choose_type APPR_STAT ;

	field inspection_plan
      	links_to inspection_header . identity
      	used_for inspection ;

	field report_template_id	  
	      links_to report_template . identity as report_template ;

	field report_template_version
	      links_to report_template . version as report_template ;

	field cert_id
            links_to cert . certificate_id as cert ;

	field cert_version
            links_to cert . certificate_version as cert;

	field starting_point
		datatype text;

	field end_point
		datatype text;

	field customer
		datatype text;

	field date
		datatype text;

	field customer_po
		datatype text;

	field fb_product_description
		links_to mlp_header.description;

	field fb_contrainer_seal_no
		datatype text(500);

	field fb_bl_number
		datatype text(100);

	field fb_contract_number
		datatype text(100);

	field fb_shipment_quantity
		datatype text(100);

	field unit
		links_to unit_header . identity;

	field Isotank_seal_lot_info
		datatype text(2000);
	
	field fb_vessel
		datatype text(100);

	field comments
	      datatype text ( 500 )
	      default NULL ;

{********************************************************************************************************Daily Statistics Report Template Development***************************************************************************************}

table fb_stat_report_temp;

	field identity
		datatype text (30)
		used_for unique_key, display_browse ( 1 );

	field Name 
		datatype text (100)
		used_for name, primary_browse;

	field Real_Name
		datatype text (80);

	field Description
		datatype text (255)
		used_for display_browse ( 2 );

	field Time_Range_Cal
		datatype identity
	      prompt_type choose

table fb_stat_report_temp_filters ;

    field identity
          links_to parent fb_stat_report_temp.identity
          used_for unique_key ;

    field connect_type
          datatype text ( 100 ) ;

    field field
          datatype text ( 100 ) ;

    field operator
          datatype identity
          default 'EQUAL'
          prompt_type choose
          choose_type RRTEM_F_O;

    field value
          datatype text ( 200 );

    field order_number 
          datatype packed_decimal
          used_for unique_key, ordering;

    field criteria
          links_to criteria_saved . identity as criteria_saved ;
        
    field criteria_tablename
          links_to criteria_saved . table_name as criteria_saved ;

view samp_test_result_ipqc on_table sample,test,result, fb_in_process;
 
        field id_numeric
			  used_for unique_key, display_browse(1)
			  links_to sample.id_numeric;

        field test_number
			  used_for unique_key, display_browse(2)
			  links_to test .test_number;

        field component_name
			  used_for unique_key, display_browse(4)
			  links_to result.name;

        field job_name
			  links_to sample.job_name;

        field id_text
			  links_to sample.id_text;

        field status
		      links_to sample.status;

        field sample_old_status
			  links_to sample.old_status;

        field on_spec
			  links_to sample.on_spec;

        field re_sampled
			  links_to sample.re_sampled;

        field original_sample
			  links_to sample.original_sample;

        field login_date
			  links_to sample.login_date;

        field login_by
			  links_to sample.login_by;

        field sampled_date
			  links_to sample.sampled_date;

        field recd_date
			  links_to sample.recd_date;

        field date_started
			  links_to sample.date_started;

        field starter
			  links_to sample.starter;

        field dateresreq
			  links_to sample.dateresreq;

        field date_completed
			  links_to sample.date_completed;

        field completer
			  links_to sample.completer;

        field sample_date_authorised
			  links_to sample.date_authorised;

        field authoriser
			  links_to sample.authoriser;

        field authorisation_notes
			  links_to sample.authorisation_notes;

        field product
			  links_to sample.product;

        field product_version
			  links_to sample.product_version;

        field grade_code
			  links_to sample.grade_code;

        field tests_to_do
			  links_to sample.tests_to_do;

        field sampling_point
			  links_to sample.sampling_point;

        field sample_type
			  links_to sample.sample_type;

        field sample_name
			  links_to sample.sample_name;

        field description
			  links_to sample.description;

        field test_schedule
			  links_to sample.test_schedule;

        field analysis
			  used_for display_browse(3)
			  links_to test.analysis;

        field test_status
			  links_to test.status;

        field instrument
			  links_to test.instrument;

        field replicate_test
			  links_to test . replicate_test;

        field test_count
			  links_to test . test_count ;

        field result_type
			  links_to result.result_type;

        field result_status
			  links_to result.status;

        field result_text
			  links_to result.text;

        field result_value
			  links_to result.value;

        field units
			  links_to result.units;

        field minimum
			  links_to result.minimum;

        field maximum
			  links_to result.maximum;

        field out_of_range
			  links_to result.out_of_range;

        field date_result_entered
			  links_to result.entered_on;

        field result_entered_by
			  links_to result.entered_by;

        field date_result_authorised
			  links_to result.date_authorised;

        field result_authoriser
			  links_to result.authoriser;

		field factory
			  links_to sample.fb_factory;

		field factory_test
			  links_to test.fb_factory;

		field good_owner_factory
			  links_to sample.fb_good_owner_factory;

		field plant
			  links_to sample.fb_plant;

		field in_process
			  links_to sample.fb_in_process;
			  
		field production_line
			  links_to fb_in_process.production_line;
			  
		field inspection_category
			  links_to sample.fb_inspection_category;

		field time_sampplan
			links_to sample.fb_time_sampplan;
 
 
select_clause
 
      SELECT

		sample.id_numeric		     ,

		test .test_number,

		result.name,

		sample.job_name,

		sample.id_text,

                sample.status,

sample.old_status,

sample.on_spec,

sample.re_sampled,

sample.original_sample,

sample.login_date,

sample.login_by,

sample.sampled_date,

sample.recd_date,

sample.date_started,

sample.starter,

sample.dateresreq,

sample.date_completed,

sample.completer,

sample.date_authorised,

sample.authoriser,

sample.authorisation_notes,

sample.product,

sample.product_version,

sample.grade_code,

sample.tests_to_do,

sample.sampling_point,

sample.sample_type,

sample.sample_name,

sample.description,

sample.test_schedule,

test.analysis,

test.status,

test.instrument,

test . replicate_test,

test . test_count ,

result.result_type,

result.status,

result.text,

result.value,

result.units,

result.minimum,

result.maximum,

result.out_of_range,

result.entered_on,

result.entered_by,

result.date_authorised,

result.authoriser,

sample.fb_factory,

test.fb_factory,

sample.fb_good_owner_factory,

sample.fb_plant,

sample.fb_in_process,

fb_in_process.production_line,

sample.fb_inspection_category,

sample.fb_time_sampplan

      FROM

              SAMPLE, TEST, RESULT, FB_IN_PROCESS

      WHERE

		TEST.SAMPLE = SAMPLE.ID_NUMERIC AND RESULT.TEST_NUMBER = TEST.TEST_NUMBER AND SAMPLE.FB_IN_PROCESS = FB_IN_PROCESS.[IDENTITY];
